title: Peponium cienkowskii
taxonomy: Peponium cienkowskii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Peponium, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to tropical Africa. Peponium cienkowskii is further classified as a member of the tribe Cucurbitaceae tribe, which includes other plants such as cucumbers, melons, and gourds. The plant's classification is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics, as well as its phylogenetic relationships with other plants. As a result of its classification, Peponium cienkowskii is considered to be a unique and interesting species within the Cucurbitaceae family.
